description: Design and Technologies capability progression map — Processes and Production Skills strand, Foundation to Years 9-10. Band-based and organised by normalised capability labels aligned to ACARA headings.
subject: Design and Technologies

standards.title: Design and make solutions
standards.description: generate, communicate and evaluate design ideas, and use materials, equipment and steps to safely make a solution for a purpose
standards.capability_goal: Students generate, communicate and evaluate design ideas, and use materials, equipment and steps to safely make a solution for a purpose.

standards.title: Describe, draw and model ideas
standards.description: generate and communicate design ideas through describing, drawing or modelling, including using digital tools
standards.capability_goal: Students generate and communicate design ideas through describing, drawing or modelling, including using digital tools.

standards.title: Safely make designed solutions
standards.description: use materials, components, tools, equipment and techniques to safely make designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students use materials, components, tools, equipment and techniques to safely make designed solutions.

standards.title: Evaluate success and sustainability
standards.description: evaluate the success of design ideas and solutions based on personal preferences and including sustainability
standards.capability_goal: Students evaluate the success of design ideas and solutions based on personal preferences and including sustainability.

standards.title: Sequence making steps cooperatively
standards.description: sequence steps for making designed solutions cooperatively
standards.capability_goal: Students sequence steps for making designed solutions cooperatively.

standards.title: Explore needs and test materials
standards.description: explore needs or opportunities for designing, and test materials, components, tools, equipment and processes needed to create designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students explore needs or opportunities for designing, and test materials, components, tools, equipment and processes needed to create designed solutions.

standards.title: Communicate design decisions
standards.description: generate and communicate design ideas and decisions using appropriate attributions, technical terms and graphical representation techniques, including using digital tools
standards.capability_goal: Students generate and communicate design ideas and decisions using appropriate attributions, technical terms and graphical representation techniques, including using digital tools.

standards.title: Select tools and techniques
standards.description: select and use materials, components, tools, equipment and techniques to safely make designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students select and use materials, components, tools, equipment and techniques to safely make designed solutions.

standards.title: Use criteria to evaluate solutions
standards.description: use given or co-developed design criteria including sustainability to evaluate design ideas and solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students use given or co-developed design criteria, including sustainability, to evaluate design ideas and solutions.

standards.title: Sequence collaborative production
standards.description: sequence steps to individually and collaboratively make designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students sequence steps to individually and collaboratively make designed solutions.

standards.title: Investigate needs and processes
standards.description: investigate needs or opportunities for designing, and the materials, components, tools, equipment and processes needed to create designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students investigate needs or opportunities for designing, and the materials, components, tools, equipment and processes needed to create designed solutions.

standards.title: Iterate and communicate designs
standards.description: generate, iterate and communicate design ideas, decisions and processes using technical terms and graphical representation techniques, including using digital tools
standards.capability_goal: Students generate, iterate and communicate design ideas, decisions and processes using technical terms and graphical representation techniques, including using digital tools.

standards.title: Use suitable materials and techniques
standards.description: select and use suitable materials, components, tools, equipment and techniques to safely make designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students select and use suitable materials, components, tools, equipment and techniques to safely make designed solutions.

standards.title: Negotiate criteria for evaluation
standards.description: negotiate design criteria including sustainability to evaluate design ideas, processes and solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students negotiate design criteria, including sustainability, to evaluate design ideas, processes and solutions.

standards.title: Develop project plans and resources
standards.description: develop project plans that include consideration of resources to individually and collaboratively make designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students develop project plans that include consideration of resources to individually and collaboratively make designed solutions.

standards.title: Analyse opportunities and select resources
standards.description: analyse needs or opportunities for designing, and investigate and select materials, components, tools, equipment and processes to create designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse needs or opportunities for designing, and investigate and select materials, components, tools, equipment and processes to create designed solutions.

standards.title: Test and refine design ideas
standards.description: generate, test, iterate and communicate design ideas, processes and solutions using technical terms and graphical representation techniques, including using digital tools
standards.capability_goal: Students generate, test, iterate and communicate design ideas, processes and solutions using technical terms and graphical representation techniques, including using digital tools.

standards.title: Justify production choices
standards.description: select, justify and use suitable materials, components, tools, equipment, skills and processes to safely make designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students select, justify and use suitable materials, components, tools, equipment, skills and processes to safely make designed solutions.

standards.title: Develop criteria collaboratively
standards.description: develop design criteria collaboratively including sustainability to evaluate design ideas, processes and solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students develop design criteria collaboratively, including sustainability, to evaluate design ideas, processes and solutions.

standards.title: Manage time, cost and production
standards.description: develop project plans to individually and collaboratively manage time, cost and production of designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students develop project plans to individually and collaboratively manage time, cost and production of designed solutions.

standards.title: Develop briefs and analyse resources
standards.description: analyse needs or opportunities for designing; develop design briefs; and investigate, analyse and select materials, systems, components, tools and equipment to create designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students analyse needs or opportunities for designing, develop design briefs, and investigate, analyse and select materials, systems, components, tools and equipment to create designed solutions.

standards.title: Innovate design solutions
standards.description: apply innovation and enterprise skills to generate, test, iterate and communicate design ideas, processes and solutions, including using digital tools
standards.capability_goal: Students apply innovation and enterprise skills to generate, test, iterate and communicate design ideas, processes and solutions, including using digital tools.

standards.title: Test and apply production processes
standards.description: select, justify, test and use suitable technologies, skills and processes, and apply safety procedures to safely make designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students select, justify, test and use suitable technologies, skills and processes, and apply safety procedures to safely make designed solutions.

standards.title: Develop criteria independently
standards.description: develop design criteria independently including sustainability to evaluate design ideas, processes and solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students develop design criteria independently, including sustainability, to evaluate design ideas, processes and solutions.

standards.title: Manage projects for audiences
standards.description: develop project plans for intended purposes and audiences to individually and collaboratively manage projects, taking into consideration time, cost, risk, processes and production of designed solutions
standards.capability_goal: Students develop project plans for intended purposes and audiences to individually and collaboratively manage projects, taking into consideration time, cost, risk, processes and production of designed solutions.

capability_threads.description: Capability maturation sequences for Design and Technologies Processes and Production Skills. Sequences show increasing sophistication across bands rather than strict prerequisite dependency.

_notes.normalised_labels: Capability strand keys are normalised for cross-subject comparison while titles and labels preserve ACARA wording.
